title: crotalaria bifaria
intro: Crotalaria bifaria, also known as the two-stemmed rattlebox, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria bifaria include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used as a poultice to apply topically to affected areas.
